title: NextStep
desc: A career exploration and planning app that helps high school seniors and recent graduates discover pathways after graduation through guided, structured decision-making.

title: Nerd Street CRM
desc: A donor relationship management platform for nonprofits that replaces fragmented spreadsheets with centralized donor profiles, contributions, and communication history.

title: PlayerLobby (Coming Soon)
desc: A collaborative planning platform that helps groups organize hangouts by voting on activities, coordinating schedules, allowing them to manage shared plans and budget in one place.

title: Halo (Coming Soon)
desc: A lightweight analytics and presence tracker for live events and streamers — real-time viewer stats, chat highlights, and session summaries.

title: EchoBoard (Coming Soon)
desc: A small collaborative whiteboard and brainstorming tool for quick idea capture and lightweight team sketches.

title: ClearCents
desc: A personal finance tool that helps users track and categorize expenses, visualize spending patterns, and make more intentional budgeting decisions.
